# setHardwareAssists | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ NetworkingDriverKit ](/documentation/networkingdriverkit)

- [ IOUserNetworkEthernet ](/documentation/networkingdriverkit/iousernetworkethernet)

- [ setHardwareAssists ](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkEthernet/setHardwareAssists-3vpkr)

-  setHardwareAssists 

Instance Method# setHardwareAssists

DriverKit 22.0+

```
IOReturn setHardwareAssists(uint32_t hardwareAssists, uint32_t hardwareAssistsMask);
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkEthernet/setHardwareAssists-3vpkr#parameters)

`hardwareAssists`The requested assists available to the stack.

`hardwareAssistsMask`The Specific assist that the driver should set..

## [Return Value](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkEthernet/setHardwareAssists-3vpkr#return-value)

Returns kIOReturnSuccess on success, or an error otherwise.

## [Discussion](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkEthernet/setHardwareAssists-3vpkr#discussion)

Set the stack requested hardware assists.

Driver should implement this function to be able to update itself with requested assists.
